array.string: LOG_DIR=/Users/jeffbridwell/Library/Logs/Gathering for LOG in fuseki.log gathering-app.log loki.log prometheus.log grafana.log; do FILE="$LOG_DIR/$LOG" if [ -f "$FILE" ] && [ $(stat -f%z "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -gt 104857600 ]; then mv "$FILE" "${FILE}.$(date +%Y%m%d)" gzip "${FILE}.$(date +%Y%m%d)" 2>/dev/null find "$LOG_DIR" -name "${LOG}.*" -mtime +7 -delete 2>/dev/null fi done
